mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.avatar_url FROM user_spot_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.spot_id = #{spotId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, s.name AS spot_name, s.cover_image_url FROM user_spot_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN spot s ON r.spot_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, s.name AS spot_name, s.cover_image_url FROM user_spot_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN spot s ON r.spot_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{spotName}, '%')
ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, s.name AS spot_name, s.cover_image_url FROM user_spot_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN spot s ON r.spot_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.is_published = 1 WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.comment IS NOT NULL AND r.comment != '' AND r.score >= #{minScore} AND r.score <= #{maxScore} ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, r.score, r.comment, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created_at FROM user_spot_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.spot_id = #{spotId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.comment IS NOT NULL AND r.comment != '' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(r.score), 1), 0.0) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS ratingCount FROM user_spot_review r WHERE r.spot_id = #{spotId} AND r.is_deleted = 0
